title: April 2026 Probate Court Decrees
summary: Two signed Waterbury Probate Court decrees concerning a will contest and administration of the Estate of Gina Marie Gazvoda.

provenance.review_method: Direct visual review of two signed PC-160 decree scans
provenance.notes: The public page paraphrases the operative findings and orders. The archived scans contain addresses and signatures that are not republished.

operative_scope: Will contest decree concerning the July 28, 2019 will
Removal and appointment of successor fiduciary decree
Final financial report and inventory deadlines
scope_limitations: Does not determine Gina Gazvoda's cause or manner of death
Does not determine criminal responsibility for her death
Does not extend beyond the will contest and estate-administration rulings stated in the decrees
page_citations: Will Contest Decree, PC-160, page 1 of 1
Removal and Appointment of Successor Decree, PC-160, page 1 of 1
redaction_notes: Residential and professional addresses, signatures, and service-recipient details are omitted from the public summary.

revision_history.change_summary: Created structured record and local public route.
